hero.subtext: Create day-by-day itineraries, invite your travel crew, and coordinate every detail together — from anywhere.

simplicity.description: No endless forms. No unnecessary data collection. In 30 seconds, you're planning your next adventure. That's it.
simplicity.alwaysFreeDescription: No credit card required. Plan unlimited trips.

features.dayByDayDesc: Organize every trip with detailed daily schedules. Add activities, meals, and sights with specific times to keep everyone on track.
features.inviteCrewDesc: Share plans with friends and family in seconds. Send an email invite and they're in — collaborating on the itinerary instantly.
features.editTogetherDesc: Every collaborator can add ideas, rearrange activities, and keep the itinerary in sync — whether you're in the same room or across the world.

cta.description:
Create your first trip in under a minute.
Free, forever.
